issues.description: Condition missing required check. Card text states 'If you have a purple {Big Mom Pirates} type Character other than [Charlotte Anana]' — requires HasCardOnBoard condition with type filter (Purple + Big Mom Pirates + excluding Charlotte Anana), not Always
Duration should be 'Permanent' (correct) but the conditional logic is broken. The Blocker keyword should only apply when the HasCardOnBoard condition is met. Restructure needed.
